title_en: World-model reasoning crosses into language-agent planning
title_zh: 世界模型推理跨入语言智能体规划
description_en: Agent Planning with World Knowledge Model applies world-model-style reasoning to agent planning with global and local knowledge.
description_zh: 《Agent Planning with World Knowledge Model》把世界模型式推理应用到结合全局与局部知识的智能体规划中。
why_it_matters: It helps connect the world-model tradition with the modern agentic-planning wave.
